title: cicerbita petiolata
intro: Cicerbita petiolata, also known as woolly heads or woolly leafed hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cicerbita petiolata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers typically used for herbal preparations.
